name: Yangjisa Co., Ltd.
summary: Yangjisa Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells diaries worldwide. The company engages in printing and bookbinding pocket and desk diaries, as well as desk accessories, travel and IT accessories, and others. It also exports stationery and pocket products, and diaries worldwide. The company distributes its products to large-scale discount stores, book stores/franchises, and wholesale/retail stores, as well as to companies and public institutions under the YANGJI and Di lusso names. Yangjisa Co., Ltd. was founded in 1976 and is headquartered in Gimpo, South Korea.
